prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy portrait of a graceful young woman in traditional Chinese hanfu standing beside a quiet lake at sunset, her face intentionally obscured by a plain beige rectangular privacy block. She wears a flowing layered coral red and pale peach embroidered hanfu with delicate floral patterns, translucent gauze sleeves, long trailing silk ribbons, and ornate hair ornaments in a dark updo. She holds a large round pale pink oil-paper parasol behind her shoulder, its bamboo ribs glowing translucently in the backlight. The setting is an idyllic ancient Chinese riverside landscape under a huge old weeping willow with a thick textured trunk on the left and countless golden hanging branches framing the top of the image. Warm sunlight sits low near the horizon, reflecting across the water in sparkling bands; distant misty mountains, a small traditional pavilion, and soft peach clouds appear in the background. The foreground has wildflowers, grasses, and a narrow dirt path, with petals and fabric ribbons catching the breeze. Use a romantic painterly realism style, ultra-detailed fabric embroidery, soft atmospheric haze, golden-hour rim light, warm amber and rose color grading, dreamy ethereal mood, depth of field, elegant composition, full-body view, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio.
